characters.description: The new authority-holder of Nagast, taking stock of the damaged former Archon's temple while an approaching danger troubles him.
characters.name: Felix Nevarre

characters.description: Felix's exhausted but loyal bonded companion, recovering beside him after recent fighting. Pit remains closely linked to Felix and serves as his guardian beast and combat partner.
characters.name: Pit

characters.description: The Lady of Harwatch and the civil authority responsible for the city's people and defenses before this book begins.
characters.name: Cal

characters.description: An ancient paragon inhabiting the repaired but incomplete construct once used by the Archon. Karys advises Felix despite damaged self-repair and improvised replacement parts.
characters.name: Karys Taiv

characters.description: One of the two frost-giant witches leading the delegation that confronts Felix. She demands lethal combat to settle the debt created by her people's former captivity.
characters.name: The Frost-Giant Leader

characters.description: A Master Tier chanter and enchanter who forces her way out of an enclosed city to reach Nagast. Though severely depleted, Zara acts quickly after concluding that Felix is alive and that hostile forces are gathering.
characters.name: Zara Cyrene

characters.description: A spear fighter and politically informed ally who advises Felix during the frost giant confrontation. She offers practical help while he decides how to answer the giants' demand for combat.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne

characters.description: A frontline fighter who interrupts Felix with news that frost giants have arrived to confront his group. Their presence alarms her, and she brings him from the stronghold control node to face them.
characters.name: Evie Aren

characters.description: A veteran fighter and practical adviser who counsels Felix during the confrontation with the frost giants, though Felix refuses his help in the duel.
characters.name: Harn

characters.description: A fire mage working with Alistair to preserve and study the destroyed Archon's sigil array. He is part of Felix's close group as Nagast begins turning captured infrastructure into a functioning stronghold.
characters.name: Atar V'as

characters.description: A force mage collaborating with Atar V'as to copy the sigil array that once controlled the Archon's reservoirs. His technical work preserves knowledge that would otherwise have been lost with the ruined system.
characters.name: Alistair

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne's assigned protector, introduced while traveling with Zara toward the Foglands. He joins the journey because Vessilia is in Nagast and outside forces are gathering against Felix's authority.
characters.name: The Hand of Pax Rell

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne's protector and a member of Felix Nevarre's core team. Darius helps coordinate the company's breakout through the paladin-held pass.
characters.name: Darius Reed

characters.description: A Henaari intermediary who asks Felix to judge the captive Matriarch on behalf of the Henaari Synod. The request places A'zek between Felix's new authority and the Henaari leadership.
characters.name: A'zek

characters.description: A captive Henaari leader whose fate the Synod asks Felix Nevarre to judge.
characters.name: The Henaari Matriarch

characters.description: A Chimera who begins teaching Pit that a guardian beast's path involves deeper duties than simply protecting a bonded companion.
characters.name: The Fellow Chimera

characters.description: A Henaari elder who accepts a permanent settlement for his people near the lake. He assumes responsibility for their scouting work and for keeping the deposed Matriarch in custody.
characters.name: The Far Walker

characters.description: A paladin captain presented to Felix's delegation as a High Justiciar. He enters the council chamber after the city's rulers activate a stronger suppression array and joins their effort to seize the visitors for sacrifice.
characters.name: The Apparent High Justiciar

characters.description: The High Justiciar who recognized the Minotaur as Unbound during an apparently friendly meeting and tried to detain him. Haim was also searching for a royal tomb in the desert.
characters.name: Haim

characters.description: A wounded Earth-born Unbound inhabiting a minotaur body and fleeing Hierocracy paladins in the Scorched Expanse. His necromantic companion can continue speaking through a replacement construct when one body is destroyed.
characters.name: The Minotaur

characters.description: The Minotaur's speaking necromantic companion, able to transfer its presence between constructed bodies. When a scorpion form is destroyed during the flight from paladins, the same voice continues through a multipede.
characters.name: The Minotaur's Undead Companion

characters.description: An unseen hostile naga-folk claimant who declares the submerged temple its domain and challenges the arriving expedition.
characters.name: The Albino Naga Claimant

characters.description: An immense abyssal serpent who rules the submerged temple's naga and challenges Felix's claim to Nym inheritance. The ruler orders him to prove his identity and strength against the threat contained within the temple's mana well.
characters.name: The Naga Ruler

characters.description: The settlement's former shaman, encountered as a monstrously altered figure inside the immense skeleton. The shaman challenges the purpose of Felix's caravan and attacks his bond with Pit during their confrontation.
characters.name: The Cursed Shaman

characters.description: The minor goddess or Urge identified as the desert city's power source.
characters.name: The Highest Flame

characters.description: A concealed healer living in the lower chasm who shelters Felix after his violent passage through the city's storm barrier. Her identity and abilities remain unclear when he reaches her dwelling in a badly strained condition.
characters.name: The Hidden Healer

characters.description: The chanter who sheltered Felix under the guise of a lower-chasm healer. After revealing her human form and connection to Zara, she leaves the hidden dwelling to help rescue Felix's captured companions.
characters.name: Zara's Sister

characters.description: A faun temple defender with a strained history as Atar's former rival. She recognizes him at the sealed city gate and accepts his oath that the caravan is fleeing an army, allowing the defenders to open the way.
characters.name: The Temple Disciple

characters.description: The city's dominant fire combatant, powerful enough to overwhelm Felix's party after it escapes the council's suppression array. His direct attack leaves Felix badly injured and forces him through the storm barrier.
characters.name: The Fire Grandmaster
